name: flow-marketplace-automation
description: Playwright UI and API automation framework for Flow Marketplace web application (TypeScript, POM architecture).

scripts.test: npx playwright test; npx tsx utils/dashboard.ts
scripts.test:headed: npx playwright test --headed; npx tsx utils/dashboard.ts
scripts.test:api: npx playwright test tests/api; npx tsx utils/dashboard.ts
scripts.test:auth: npx playwright test tests/UI/auth; npx tsx utils/dashboard.ts
scripts.test:marketplace: npx playwright test tests/UI/marketplace; npx tsx utils/dashboard.ts
scripts.test:migration: npx playwright test tests/UI/migration; npx tsx utils/dashboard.ts
scripts.test:validate: npx playwright test tests/UI/migration/validate.spec.ts; npx tsx utils/dashboard.ts
scripts.test:shopify: npx playwright test tests/UI/shopify tests/UI/auth/shopify.setup.spec.ts; npx tsx utils/dashboard.ts
scripts.test:probes: npx playwright test tests/UI/probes; npx tsx utils/dashboard.ts
scripts.test:smoke: npx playwright test tests/UI/migration/e2e-smoke/ --workers=2; npx tsx utils/dashboard.ts
scripts.test:e2e-full: npx playwright test --config tests/UI/migration/e2e-full/playwright.config.ts; npx tsx utils/dashboard.ts
scripts.test:e2e-full:dry: DRY_RUN=1 npx playwright test --config tests/UI/migration/e2e-full/playwright.config.ts; npx tsx utils/dashboard.ts
scripts.test:e2e-full:p1: npx playwright test --config tests/UI/migration/e2e-full/playwright.config.ts --grep "phase:1"; npx tsx utils/dashboard.ts
scripts.test:e2e-full:p1:dry: DRY_RUN=1 npx playwright test --config tests/UI/migration/e2e-full/playwright.config.ts --grep "phase:1"; npx tsx utils/dashboard.ts
scripts.test:e2e-single: npx playwright test tests/UI/migration/e2e_migration.spec.ts --timeout=300000 --workers=1 --retries=0; npx tsx utils/dashboard.ts
scripts.test:e2e-single:full: npx playwright test tests/UI/migration/e2e_migration_full.spec.ts --timeout=600000 --workers=1 --retries=0; npx tsx utils/dashboard.ts
